rationale: For Portugal, the unresolved US-Iran deal is the only story with indirect relevance via energy prices; all other headlines are geographically or economically distant.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal signing disputed — Sunday timeline unclear
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran nuclear deal could reduce European energy costs, benefiting Portugal's cost of living indirectly. Still unconfirmed — no qualitative change from prior cycle.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Atlantic shipping lane enforcement is marginally relevant to Portugal's trade, but this is a minor incident with no direct impact on Portuguese daily life.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss immigration referendum has no meaningful impact on Portugal's economy or daily life; distant political event.
